title: Fighting the Corona Recession: Our 7-Pronged Business Plan
summary: A real-time look at the 7-pronged business plan put together in March 2020 as the pandemic hit — what was cut, what was doubled down on, and why.
full_content_text: A real-time look at the 7-pronged business plan put together in March 2020 as the pandemic hit — what was cut, what was doubled down on, and why.
